calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Dec-03-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Craig Kronman for and with Dorothy Strickland (Wife of the Decedent) and Wayman Strickland, Jr. (Son of the Decedent).

Mr. Kronman stated that in 1969 the property was deeded in both names, that he was the Attorney and did this a matter of caution, that Mr. Strickland, Sr. listed every asset, that when they (Mr. and Mrs. Strickland) came in they were very aware of what was his and what was hers, and that they were in agreement. Mr. Kronman also stated that Mr. Strickland, Sr. was very concerned about having a line of credit and that Mr. Strickland, Sr.'s fingerprints are on it and that it is all about taxes. The Court granted the Petition for Spousal Property (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Oct-16-2019 Continued To Nov-27-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Robert Garcia specially appearing for Attorney Craig Kronman on behalf of Dorothy Strickland.

Discussion was held regarding the separate property agreement, the agreement making reference to community property, the issue of the property passing upon death, whether a record of an agreement between the parties is sufficient to rebut recording of title, etc. The Petition for Spousal Property is continued to November 27, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Counsel to provide legal authority in support of his petition.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
